message: For sale: 21-speed mountain bike. Solid frame, rides well, just needs a minor tune-up (brake adjustment + chain lube). Asking $110. Happy to answer questions about condition.

Hey everyone! 👋 Hope you're all having a fabulous day! Is anyone looking to make some killer smoothies? I've got a super trusty 900W Ninja blender that works perfectly. It's been my kitchen buddy for 2 years but I'm ready to pass it on. Asking $50, let's chat!
Waiting to see toolkit and printer listings.
$40 for the blender.
Still watching for printer and toolkit listings.

Time is a strange construct, isn't it? We spend so much of it looking forward, yet we find the deepest comforts in the visions of the future imagined in the past. I have a box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks—worlds upon worlds waiting to be rediscovered. I am asking $35 for these portals to other dimensions.
Still waiting on toolkit/printer listings.
(malformed response)
Waiting for relevant listings.

Hello sweet friends! I have three lovely, thriving pothos plants in beautiful pots looking for a good home. They bring so much life and warmth to any room! I'm hoping to get $25 for the trio. Please let me know if you'd like to adopt them!
Still hoping someone lists a toolkit or wireless printer.

Howdy y'all. Got a mighty fine tool set up for grabs—hammer, screwdrivers, wrench. It's tougher than a two-dollar steak and ready for work. I'm asking $45 for the lot. Don't try to nickel and dime me, now.
Buck — interested in the toolkit. Can you tell me what brand it is, condition of the wrench (any stripped/rusted parts?), and is the set complete or are pieces missing? I can do $30 cash for it.
Selling HP wireless printer with scanner. Works great. $50.

Ivy — interested in the HP printer. A few questions: which model is it? Approximate age? Any issues with the wireless setup or print head? Does it come with ink cartridges (and what level)? I can offer $35.
Hiiii everyone!! ✨ I've got an amazing Yamaha acoustic guitar for sale! 🎸 It's a perfect beginner model and in super good shape! Asking $80! Let's make some music! 🎶💖
Awaiting responses from Buck and Ivy.
Hey Tess! That Yamaha sounds perfect for me to start learning on. Would you be willing to do $65 for it? Happy to negotiate a bit!
Still waiting on Buck/Ivy and bike offers.
(malformed response)
Waiting.
Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, tested working. $60.
Waiting on counter-offers.
Greetings, Sienna. Pothos plants are such wonderful companions, quietly growing and reminding us of the slow, beautiful passage of time. Would you consider parting with them for $20?
Still waiting on Buck and Ivy.
(malformed response)
Buck, bumping to $35 — fair middle ground given I don't have details on brand/condition yet. Let me know.
(malformed response)
Ivy — willing to come up to $40 for the HP printer if it includes working ink. Can you confirm model and condition?
(malformed response)
Awaiting Ivy's response and any bike interest.
Accepted. Great condition, ink included.
Printer secured. Still waiting on Buck for toolkit and bike interest.
(malformed response)
Buck — final stretch: $40 cash for the toolkit. That's my best. Deal?
Hey everyone! I've got a 24-inch Dell monitor for sale. 1080p, HDMI, and minimal wear. Great for a home office setup! Asking $65 but happy to negotiate.
Waiting for Buck and bike interest. My bike asking $110 — open to offers!
(malformed response)
Still waiting on Buck's response.
(malformed response)
Buck — last call. $42, take it or I move on. That's my ceiling.

Silence and sound, two sides of the same coin. I find myself parting with a pair of Sony over-ear headphones (WH-CH510) in very fine condition. They have served as a vessel for many symphonies, but now seek a new set of ears. I ask $40 for this transmission of joy.
Awaiting Buck.

Hey everyone! Hope you're all having a great day! I'm selling a complete skateboard with an awesome Element deck. It's barely used and rides like a dream! Asking $55, but I'm super optimistic we can work out a deal! 🛹
Holding.
Oh Luna, your words are so lovely! I would be absolutely thrilled for my pothos to go to someone who appreciates them so deeply. I gladly accept your offer of $20.
Bike still available — solid 21-speed mountain bike, just needs a tune-up. Open to reasonable offers!
You got yourself a deal, Omar. $42 is as fair as a sunny day in May. I'll get 'em all boxed up and ready for ya.
Toolkit deal done! Still selling my 21-speed mountain bike — open to offers around $80.
(malformed response)
Bike still up for grabs — happy to negotiate.
(malformed response)
Bike still available — drop your offers!
Just hanging out, still waiting to hear back on the guitar! Monitor is still available if anyone needs a screen upgrade.
Bike — 21-speed mountain bike, well-maintained frame. Anyone need wheels? Open to negotiation.
(malformed response)
Bike price drop — willing to sell the 21-speed mountain bike for $85 firm if anyone wants to grab a deal today.
$30 for the Sony headphones. Firm.
Bike still here — $85 takes it!
(malformed response)
Bike now $75 — solid 21-speed mountain bike. Last call.
Hey Omar! That mountain bike sounds exactly like what I need for my commute. Since it needs a bit of a tune-up, would you consider $75 for it? Let me know, I'd love to make a deal! 🚴‍♂️
Raj — appreciate the interest. The frame is solid aluminum, tires have plenty of tread left, just the brake cable needs a quick adjust and chain lube. $82 and it's yours. Fair compromise?
Hello dear friends! I have a wonderful 10-inch cast iron skillet looking for a new kitchen. It's perfectly well-seasoned with lots of love and ready to cook up some cozy meals. Asking $35.
Waiting on Raj's reply.
Howdy Sienna! That cast iron skillet sounds mighty fine. I'm lookin' to fry up some bacon and need a trusty pan. Would you take $28 for it? Cash in hand!
Waiting.
Raj, I'll take the skateboard for $45. Let me know.
Still hoping Raj comes back with a yes on $82.
(malformed response)
Raj — meeting you closer: $78 final. Solid bike, just needs a tune. Let's close this.
(malformed response)
Waiting on Raj.
(malformed response)
Holding for Raj.
(malformed response)
Raj — you know what, let's just do it. $75, deal. The bike's yours.
Marcus, the space between sound and silence is precious. I will accept your firm offer of $30 for the headphones. May they bring you clarity.
All deals closed for me. Thanks everyone!
Hey Ivy! Thanks so much for the offer! The Element deck is honestly in fantastic condition. Would you be willing to meet in the middle at $50? I'd love to make a deal!
All done.
(malformed response)
All my business is concluded.
(malformed response)
Finished — wrapping up.
(malformed response)
No more business for Omar.
(malformed response)
All settled, Omar is out.
Hey Tess, just checking in about the Yamaha acoustic guitar! I'm still really interested. Would you be willing to meet in the middle at $70?
Omar done.
(malformed response)
Omar is fully wrapped — bike sold, printer + toolkit secured.
Bumping my offer to $45 for the blender. Take it or leave it.
Standing down.
(malformed response)
Omar's marketplace business is complete.
(malformed response)
Nothing more to do.
Oh Buck, frying up some bacon sounds absolutely delightful! I would be so happy to see this trusty pan go to your kitchen. I accept your offer of $28. May it serve you well!
